personal.name: Dhruv Amit Shah
personal.title: AI & Data Science Engineer | Blockchain & NLP Researcher
personal.bio:
Hey 👋
I'm Dhruv Shah, an AI & Data Science engineer based in Mumbai, currently in my 3rd year of B.Tech at KJ Somaiya College of Engineering with a CGPA of 9.53. I'm a Summer Intern at Veefin, building enterprise AI systems — RAG-based RFP automation, Recovery Intelligence microservices, and Apache Camel integration workflows — alongside QA automation with Postman and prompt-engineered test pipelines. I'm passionate about building things at the intersection of Generative AI, blockchain analytics, cybersecurity, NLP, FinTech, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning. From publishing IEEE research papers on cybersecurity to building forensic platforms that trace illicit crypto transactions, I enjoy working on problems that are both technically challenging and meaningful in the real world.

Lately, I've been spending a lot of time exploring LLMs, RAG pipelines, AI powered systems, and scalable architectures. I genuinely enjoy understanding how systems work end to end, experimenting with new technologies, and turning ideas into products or research driven solutions. Most of my projects revolve around combining strong technical foundations with practical implementation.

Over the years, I've worked on projects involving Bitcoin transaction classification, anti money laundering detection, anomaly detection systems, cybersecurity simulations, and AI driven analytics platforms. For me, the fun part is solving complex problems, learning continuously, and building things that actually create impact.

Apart from tech, I'm really interested in startups, business strategy, and finance. I enjoy reading about how companies scale, how founders think, and why some ideas succeed while others fail. I also love connecting with ambitious and curious people, whether it's talking about AI, startups, football, cricket, business ideas, or life in general.

Outside work and academics, you'll probably find me watching football as a huge fan of Real Madrid, following cricket, exploring good food places around Mumbai, or planning my next trip. I try to take at least three trips every year because traveling helps me reset, explore new perspectives, and stay sane in the middle of all the chaos.

Always open to good conversations, interesting opportunities, and building something meaningful with great people.

current.degree: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science

previous.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (AI & ML) — Transferred

achievements: IEEE ICCCNT 2025 – Accepted Research Paper on Healthcare Website Security
WorldQuant Brain Hackathon – Gold Level, Top 25 Rank

experience.description: Validated end-to-end Trade Finance workflows by testing Import Letter of Credit (LC) lifecycles across Issuing Banks, Advising Banks, and Exporters. Performed UI, backend integration, and REST API testing with Postman — validating payloads, status codes, business logic, error handling, multi-party data consistency, and Maker-Checker authorisation workflows. Integrated prompt engineering into QA workflows for AI-generated test scenarios and synthetic test data, accelerating test data creation by 200%. Contributed to an AI-powered Recovery Intelligence microservice for debtor prioritisation within the enterprise Collection Management System (CMS). Assisted in building a RAG-based RFP automation platform and Apache Camel ETL workflows to integrate AI microservices into existing enterprise systems.

experience.company: EUCLID – Center of Sustainable and Secure Blockchain Development
experience.description: Authored a conference paper on Vulnerability Assessment and Impact Analysis of Defacement Attacks on Healthcare Websites, accepted at the 16th International IEEE Conference on Computing, Communication and Networking Technologies (ICCCNT) 2025. Also organised an internship drive, managed industry-student interaction booths, and led the induction of multiple interns.

Developed a website that accepts PDF inputs, extracts text, applies NLP techniques, and generates a question-and-answer system without relying on external API keys. Contributed to the development of Ashna AI — India's first homegrown LLM.

Developed a custom NLP and ML architecture for news summarisation, optimising for accuracy and efficiency. Analysed pre-trained models such as T5 and BART using HuggingFace Transformers, and curated high-quality datasets for model training and fine-tuning.
Managed end-to-end logistics for a live standup comedy event featuring comedian Pranit More, coordinating with the performer, venue, and audience.

certifications.name: Databases and SQL for Data Science with Python
EDA and Data Visualization in Data Science
Python for Data Science, AI & Development

projects.title: ChainBreak – Blockchain Forensics Platform
projects.description: Developed at the CipherCop 1st National Police Hackathon (4th Place). ChainBreak is a comprehensive Bitcoin transaction tracking and analysis platform combining blockchain analytics with dark web intelligence to map pseudo-anonymized transaction graphs — detecting wallet clusters and tracing illicit patterns like peel chains and chain-hopping. Implements custom graph analysis algorithms for multi-party transaction flows with real-time risk scoring, Neo4j graph analytics, ML-based anomaly detection, OSINT enrichment, and confidence-scored risk flagging.

projects.title: Bitcoin Transaction Classification
projects.description: Built a multi-class classification ensemble model using Random Forest, XGBoost and LightGBM to classify Bitcoin transaction types (e.g., HYIP, Gambling), achieving 98.69% accuracy. Leveraged Scikit-Learn, Pandas, and NumPy for data processing and model development. It can be used to identify patterns from a single wallet to understand what purpose the wallet is being used for.

projects.title: Gold Price Prediction using News Sentiment
projects.description: Developed a hybrid model combining classification (price direction) and regression (price magnitude) using news sentiment features. Integrated NLP pipelines (TF-IDF, Word2Vec, BERT embeddings) with XGBoost and Logistic/Linear Regression, achieving 86.72% accuracy in predicting gold price movement. Includes a Streamlit GUI for real-time headline-based predictions.

images.alt: Gold price prediction using news sentiment

projects.title: Stock Fundamental Analysis & Long-Term Recommendation System
projects.description: Engineered an automated data engine utilizing yfinance, mftool, and web scrapers to aggregate financial metrics and AUM; built a classification pipeline to categorize and rank mutual funds by asset class (Equity, Debt, Hybrid) and market cap (Large, Mid, Small-cap). Developed a quantitative stock ranking system pulling live OHLC data via yfinance to evaluate core fundamentals, integrating a custom scoring algorithm that outputs automated long-term recommendations with calculated confidence scores.

images.alt: Stock fundamental analysis and recommendation system

projects.title: Mutual Fund Recommendation Engine
projects.description: A production-oriented Indian mutual fund screening and portfolio recommendation engine with category-aware discovery, quantitative feature engineering (CAGR, Sharpe, Sortino, Alpha, Beta, drawdown metrics), hybrid scoring by investment horizon (short/medium/long), and risk-profile-based portfolio allocation. Applies AUM eligibility filtering, rolling consistency checks, and benchmark-relative scoring across Equity, Hybrid, and Debt fund categories.

projects.title: PDF Q&A & MCQ Generator
projects.description: An AI-powered application that extracts text from PDF documents and generates questions, answers, and multiple-choice quizzes using state-of-the-art transformer models — without relying on external API keys. Uses deepset/roberta-base-squad2 for Q&A, T5-based fine-tuned models for question generation, and spaCy for NLP. Built during the Ashna AI internship. Features a clean Streamlit interface with confidence scoring for each answer.

projects.title: AI-Based Micro-Conversion Prediction in Websites
projects.description: A comprehensive web analytics platform that predicts user purchasing intent and intermediate micro-conversions using session-level clickstream data. Trains four classification models — Revenue, High Engagement, Product Interest, and Exit Risk — using XGBoost, LightGBM, and Random Forest, with automatic best-model selection by F1-score. Integrates SHAP for local explainability and features an interactive Streamlit dashboard for analytics and model performance monitoring.

internship.availability: Summer Intern at Veefin; open to discussing full-time roles from 2028
